summary: Add Atlas cross-references to protocol/lenses/README.md for 4 relevant lenses
spec_ref: Integration Point 3: Lens cross-references to Atlas sections

required_outputs.description: Updated lenses README with Atlas cross-refs for Systems Engineering, Safety/Risk, Topology, Product/UX

resolution: Added Atlas Reference subsections to 4 lenses in protocol/lenses/README.md: Lens 3 (Safety/Risk) with Security, Operations Pitfalls, Error Handling, Constraints refs; Lens 4 (Topology) with Connections Map, State Management, Multi-tenancy, Data Flow refs; Lens 6 (Systems Engineering) with Architecture, Integration, Platform Assessment, Environment refs; Lens 7 (Product/UX) with User-Facing Implications, Lifecycle Confidence Checks, Decision Protocol refs. Lenses 1, 2, 5 intentionally untouched.
